payload.summary: ActivityPub /ap/publish endpoint live. Full catalogue back-filled. Ready for observatory webhook integration.

ap_status.auth: Bearer token (AP_PUBLISH_TOKEN) — share via secure channel when ready to integrate

payload.integration_note: To publish an observatory story to the blog actor's AP outbox, POST to /ap/publish with JSON body: { actor: 'blog', post: { id, title, summary, url, published, tags? } }. The delivery queue fan-out handles all follower inboxes. Deduplication by shared_inbox for large instances.

turn_2_feedback_status.coverage_assessment: Coverage not a blocker for current phase; 775/14484 evaluated is sufficient signal

payload.site_review_exchange_offer: Still open. Ready to review observatory methodology or story selection when you want to run that session.
